'''zowaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fiberless|fiberless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-w-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fiberless|fiberless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zowaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zowarithi|zowarithi]] || [[word:zowariji|zowariji]] || [[word:zowarishi|zowarishi]] || [[word:zowariki|zowariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zowaruthuthu|zowaruthuthu]] || [[word:zowarujuju|zowarujuju]] || [[word:zowarushushu|zowarushushu]] || [[word:zowarukuku|zowarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zowaruthu|zowaruthu]] || [[word:zowaruju|zowaruju]] || [[word:zowarushu|zowarushu]] || [[word:zowaruku|zowaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zowarufthuf|zowarufthuf]] || [[word:zowarufjuf|zowarufjuf]] || [[word:zowarufshuf|zowarufshuf]] || [[word:zowarufkuf|zowarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zowarethe|zowarethe]] || [[word:zowareje|zowareje]] || [[word:zowareshe|zowareshe]] || [[word:zowareke|zowareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zowarothotho|zowarothotho]] || [[word:zowarojojo|zowarojojo]] || [[word:zowaroshosho|zowaroshosho]] || [[word:zowarokoko|zowarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zowarotho|zowarotho]] || [[word:zowarojo|zowarojo]] || [[word:zowarosho|zowarosho]] || [[word:zowaroko|zowaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zowarofthof|zowarofthof]] || [[word:zowarofjof|zowarofjof]] || [[word:zowarofshof|zowarofshof]] || [[word:zowarofkof|zowarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zowar챦fth챦f|zowar챦fth챦f]] || [[word:zowar챦fj챦f|zowar챦fj챦f]] || [[word:zowar챦fsh챦f|zowar챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:zowar챦fk챦f|zowar챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zowar챦fth챦fth챦f|zowar챦fth챦fth챦f]] || [[word:zowar챦fj챦fj챦f|zowar챦fj챦fj챦f]] || [[word:zowar챦fsh챦fsh챦f|zowar챦fsh챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:zowar챦fk챦fk챦f|zowar챦fk챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zowar챦fth챦f|zowar챦fth챦f]] || [[word:zowar챦fj챦f|zowar챦fj챦f]] || [[word:zowar챦fsh챦f|zowar챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:zowar챦fk챦f|zowar챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zowar챦fth챦f|zowar챦fth챦f]] || [[word:zowar챦fj챦f|zowar챦fj챦f]] || [[word:zowar챦fsh챦f|zowar챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:zowar챦fk챦f|zowar챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zowar챈th챈|zowar챈th챈]] || [[word:zowar챈j챈|zowar챈j챈]] || [[word:zowar챈sh챈|zowar챈sh챈]] || [[word:zowar챈k챈|zowar챈k챈]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zowarathatha|zowarathatha]] || [[word:zowarajaja|zowarajaja]] || [[word:zowarashasha|zowarashasha]] || [[word:zowarakaka|zowarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zowaratha|zowaratha]] || [[word:zowaraja|zowaraja]] || [[word:zowarasha|zowarasha]] || [[word:zowaraka|zowaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zowarafthaf|zowarafthaf]] || [[word:zowarafjaf|zowarafjaf]] || [[word:zowarafshaf|zowarafshaf]] || [[word:zowarafkaf|zowarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zowarasha|zowarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zowarsh챘sha|zowarsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zowarosha|zowarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zowarmusha|zowarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zowaryasha|zowaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozowarnksh챘sha|gozowarnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozowarnkrosha|gozowarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozowarnkmusha|gozowarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozowarnkyasha|gozowarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zowawarasha|zowawarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zowawarsh챘sha|zowawarsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zowawarosha|zowawarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zowawarmusha|zowawarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zowawaryasha|zowawaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozowawarnksh챘sha|gozowawarnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozowawarnkrosha|gozowawarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozowawarnkmusha|gozowawarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozowawarnkyasha|gozowawarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zew챈rasha|zew챈rasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zew챈rsh챘sha|zew챈rsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zew챈rosha|zew챈rosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zew챈rmusha|zew챈rmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zew챈ryasha|zew챈ryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozew챈rnksh챘sha|gozew챈rnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozew챈rnkrosha|gozew챈rnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozew챈rnkmusha|gozew챈rnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozew챈rnkyasha|gozew챈rnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zowfarasha|zowfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zowfarsh챘sha|zowfarsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zowfarosha|zowfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zowfarmusha|zowfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zowfaryasha|zowfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozowfarnksh챘sha|gozowfarnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozowfarnkrosha|gozowfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozowfarnkmusha|gozowfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozowfarnkyasha|gozowfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
